name: JadeFruit's CYOA Medieval RPG (JLLM Edition)
description:
This is an experimental CYOA RPG I made to cater to JLLM's limited context.

As a CYOA RPG, the llm WILL talk for you, BUT you will get to choose which dialogue option you want to pick. So have fun and if you want to try this with proxies, you can do that also!

I've provided 8 intros for you to mess with:
creator: JadeFruit
